
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# packages
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)                                           
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
```

# Generate and Visualize SI Model Predictions

## Set up beta distributions

Default are flat beta(1,1) priors over all parameters. 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# --- Specify Priors over the Structures' Parameters here ---
my_bc_prior <- c(80, 80) # bc 
my_wc_prior <- c(40, 5)  # wc
my_wa_prior <- c(1, 10)  # wa

# Set graphics 
baseSize = 16

clean_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = baseSize) +  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  )

# Create a data frame for the x-axis
df <- data.frame(x = seq(0, 1, length.out = 300))

# --- Plots with Dynamic Labels ---

# Prior for bc
p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x)) +
  geom_area(stat = "function", fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = my_bc_prior[1], shape2 = my_bc_prior[2]), 
            fill = "forestgreen", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_function(fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = my_bc_prior[1], shape2 = my_bc_prior[2]), color = "forestgreen", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = bquote("Prior for b"["c"]*": beta(" * .(my_bc_prior[1]) * "," * .(my_bc_prior[2]) * ")"), 
    x = "Value", 
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  clean_theme

# Prior for wc
p2 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x)) +
  geom_area(stat = "function", fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = my_wc_prior[1], shape2 = my_wc_prior[2]), 
            fill = "orange", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_function(fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = my_wc_prior[1], shape2 = my_wc_prior[2]), color = "orange", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = bquote("Prior for w"["c"]*": beta(" * .(my_wc_prior[1]) * "," * .(my_wc_prior[2]) * ")"), 
    x = "Value", 
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  clean_theme

# Prior for wa
p3 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x)) +
  geom_area(stat = "function", fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = my_wa_prior[1], shape2 = my_wa_prior[2]), 
            fill = "firebrick", alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_function(fun = dbeta, args = list(shape1 = my_wa_prior[1], shape2 = my_wa_prior[2]), color = "firebrick", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = bquote("Prior for w"["a"]*": beta(" * .(my_wa_prior[1]) * "," * .(my_wa_prior[2]) * ")"), 
    x = "Value", 
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  clean_theme

distr_unit <- wrap_elements(full = (p1 | p2 | p3))
distr_unit
```

## Generate the SI predictions 

```{r}
# --- Load function file ---
source("SI_model_fun.R") # the SI model functions 


# --- Specify Priors over the Structures' Parameters here ---
my_bc_prior <- c(1, 1) # bc 
my_wc_prior <- c(1, 1)  # wc
my_wa_prior <- c(1, 1)  # wa


# number of simulations 
m = 100000 # increase number for higher precision

n = 10

# --- Set up contingency tables ---
data <- matrix(data = 0, nrow = 5, ncol = 4) # add more rows for more contingency data sets
#             D  C  B  A              
data[1,] <- c(2*n, 2*n, 2*n, 2*n) # this means P(e|c) = 2/4, P(e|~c) = 2/4
data[2,] <- c(4*n, 0*n, 4*n, 0*n) # and this means P(e|c) = 0/4, P(e|~c) = 0/4
data[3,] <- c(0*n, 4*n, 0*n, 4*n) # this is ceiling 
data[4,] <- c(4*n, 0*n, 0*n, 4*n) # this is perfect determinism
data[5,] <- c(2*n, 2*n, 0*n, 4*n) # this is P(e|c) = 4/0, P(e|~c) = 2/4




# --- Sweep over priors ---
prior_grid <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.05)

# Store all results in a list
all_preds <- list()

for (p0 in prior_grid) {
  p1 <- 1 - p0
  message("Running model with prior_S0 = ", p0)
  
  preds <- generate_SI_preds(
    data = data,
    m = m,
    prior_S0 = p0,
    prior_S1 = p1,
    # Pass the parameters here:
    bc_prior = my_bc_prior,
    wc_prior = my_wc_prior,
    wa_prior = my_wa_prior
  )
  
  # Add prior info as columns for later identification
  preds$prior_S0 <- p0
  preds$prior_S1 <- p1
  
  # Store results
  all_preds[[as.character(p0)]] <- preds
}

# Combine all into one big data frame
library(dplyr)
pred_SI_all <- bind_rows(all_preds, .id = "prior_S0_label")

# make a subset containing columns 2:5, S0_pp, S1_pp, prior_S0, prior_S1
pred_SI_all <- pred_SI_all %>%
  select(N_00, N_01, N_10, N_11, S0_pp, S1_pp, prior_S0, prior_S1)




pred_SI_all <- pred_SI_all %>%
  mutate(contingency = case_when(
    N_00 == 2*n & N_01 == 2*n & N_10 == 2*n & N_11 == 2*n ~ "P(e+|c+) = 2/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 2/4",
    N_00 == 4*n & N_01 == 0*n & N_10 == 0*n & N_11 == 4*n ~ "P(e+|c+) = 4/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 0/4",
    N_00 == 4*n & N_01 == 0*n & N_10 == 4*n & N_11 == 0*n ~ "P(e+|c+) = 0/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 0/4",
    N_00 == 0*n & N_01 == 4*n & N_10 == 0*n & N_11 == 4*n ~ "P(e+|c+) = 4/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 4/4",
    N_00 == 2*n & N_01 == 2*n & N_10 == 0*n & N_11 == 4*n ~ "P(e+|c+) = 4/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 2/4",
    TRUE ~ paste(N_00, N_01, N_10, N_11, sep = "-") # Fallback to the raw numbers
  ))




# Define the levels in the order you want them to appear in the plot
contingency_levels <- c(
  "P(e+|c+) = 4/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 0/4",
  "P(e+|c+) = 4/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 2/4",
  "P(e+|c+) = 4/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 4/4",
  "P(e+|c+) = 2/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 2/4",
  "P(e+|c+) = 0/4 \nP(e+|c-) = 0/4"
)

# Convert to factor
pred_SI_all <- pred_SI_all %>%
  mutate(contingency = factor(contingency, levels = contingency_levels))
```

Get the Prior-Posterior Curves:

```{r}

si <- ggplot(pred_SI_all, aes(x = prior_S1, y = S1_pp, color = contingency, group = contingency)) +
  # 45° reference line
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  #geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name = expression("Prior: P(S"[1]*")"),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    limits = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = expression("Posterior: P(S"[1]*" | data)"),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    limits = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "C", end = 0.9) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), 
    
    # --- ADJUST SPACING HERE ---
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),      # Increases the size of the key box
    legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "cm"),    # Adds physical space between items
    # ---------------------------
  )+
  clean_theme+
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    legend.title = element_blank())

si
# save plot as svg 

#ggsave("Figures/SI_model_prior_vs_posterior_S1_N8.svg", width = 7, height = 5)
#ggsave("Figures/SI_model_prior_vs_posterior_S1_N8.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
```

Get the Prior-Posterior change

```{r}

# --- Prepare data ---
seg <- pred_SI_all %>%
  select(contingency, prior_S1, S1_pp) %>%
  transmute(
    contingency,
    id   = prior_S1,
    x0   = 0,   # Prior of S1
    x1   = 1,   # Posterior of S1
    y0   = prior_S1,
    y1   = S1_pp
  )

# Highlighted priors: Now including 0, 0.5, and 1.0
seg_hi <- seg %>%
  filter(near(id, 0.00) | near(id, 0.05) | near(id, 0.50) | near(id, 0.95)| near(id, 1.00)) %>%
  mutate(highlight_label = case_when(
    near(id, 0.00)   ~ "0.00",
    near(id, 0.05)   ~ "0.05",
    near(id, 0.50) ~ "0.50",
    near(id, 0.95)   ~ "0.95", 
    near(id, 1.00)   ~ "1.00"
  ))

# Endpoints for points + labels
endpts_hi <- seg_hi %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(c(x0, x1, y0, y1),
                      names_to = c(".value","which"),
                      names_pattern = "([xy])(\\d)") %>%
  mutate(
    which = ifelse(which == "0", "Prior of S1", "Posterior of S1"),
    x = ifelse(which == "Prior of S1", 0, 1),
    y = y
  )

# --- Plot ---
g_update_highlight <- ggplot() +
  # Reference line at y = 0.50
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.50, color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  # Faint background arrows (all data)
  geom_segment(
    data = seg,
    aes(x = x0, xend = x1, y = y0, yend = y1),
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.1,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.15, "cm"), type = "closed")
  ) +

  # Highlighted arrows (three distinct colors)
  geom_segment(
    data = seg_hi,
    aes(x = x0, xend = x1, y = y0, yend = y1, color = highlight_label),
    linewidth = 1.3, alpha = 0.85,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm"), type = "closed")
  ) +
  
  # Value labels at start and end of highlighted arrows
 # geom_text(data = endpts_hi,
  #          aes(x = x, y = y, label = sprintf("%.2f", y)),
   #         vjust = -1.1, size = 3, color = "black") +

  facet_wrap(~contingency, nrow = 1) +
  
  # Manual color scale for the three highlighted categories
  scale_color_manual(
    name = expression("Highlighted \nPriors: P(S"[1]*")"),
    values = c(
      "0.00" = "#636363",  
      "0.05" = "#7570b3",
      "0.50" = "#1b9e77",  
      "0.95" = "#d95f02",  
      "1.00" = "#252525"  
    ),
    guide = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top",
      override.aes = list(linewidth = 1.3, alpha = 1)
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c(expression("P(S"[1]*")"),
               expression("P(S"[1]*"|D)")),
    limits = c(-0.1, 1.1),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Probability",
    limits = c(0, 1.05), # Slightly increased to fit the '1.00' text label
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1)
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    
  )+
  clean_theme+
  theme(legend.position = "right", 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Display plot
g_update_highlight

# save graph as svg 
#ggsave("Figures/SI_model_prior_posterior_arrows_highlight.svg", width = 10, height = 5)
# save also as pdf 
#ggsave("Figures/SI_model_prior_posterior_arrows_highlight.pdf", width = 10, height = 5)
```
Put them together

```{r}

# Group the bottom row and force equal widths
top_row <- (si | g_update_highlight) + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 2))

# Combine with the top row
final_plot <- (top_row / distr_unit) + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') & 
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))

final_plot

# Save the combined figure
ggsave("Figures/Model_preds.svg", plot = final_plot, width = 14, height = 8, device = "svg")
# save also as pdf 
ggsave("Figures/Model_preds.pdf", plot = final_plot, width = 14, height = 8, device = "pdf")
```
